div.font: This SAP BTP Solution Diagram depicts the SAP BTP Subaccount setup for a 3-staged environment covering a development, testing and production stage.
Besides the pure SAP BTP Subaccount model, it shows the integration with the the stages of the SAP Cloud Identity Service tenants and the connectivity to the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition.
The services running in separate subaccounts might also be merged depending on the overall customers SAP BTP Subaccount Model.

a.text: Text is not SVG - cannot display
